tasks.subject: Task 1: Churn sqlc queries + regenerate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add churn SQL in a new members.sql and regenerate the sqlc db package.

**Files:** backend/internal/db/query/members.sql (create), backend/internal/db/members.sql.go (generated)

**Verify:** cd backend && just sqlc && go build ./...

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/internal/db/query/members.sql", "backend/internal/db/members.sql.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just sqlc && go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["just sqlc regenerates cleanly", "9 new query methods on db.Queries", "go build succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Extend GET /members to return everyone with status
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ListGroupMembers returns all members with status, ordered active-core/active-guest/inactive; add status to DTO; update integration fixture (guest Gwen) + assertions.

**Files:** backend/internal/db/query/roster.sql, backend/roster.go, backend/roster_integration_test.go

**Verify:** cd backend && just check && go test -tags=integration -run '^TestMembersHandlerIntegration$' ./...

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/internal/db/query/roster.sql", "backend/roster.go", "backend/roster_integration_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just check && go test -tags=integration -run '^TestMembersHandlerIntegration$' ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["returns all members ordered core/guest/inactive", "memberResponse.status added", "integration test updated with guest"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Pure seed helper + join-name validation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add pure unit-tested seedBaseline and validateJoinName (+ joinRequest DTO) in membership.go.

**Files:** backend/membership.go, backend/membership_test.go

**Verify:** cd backend && go test -run '^TestSeedBaseline$|^TestValidateJoinName$' ./...

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/membership.go", "backend/membership_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go test -run '^TestSeedBaseline$|^TestValidateJoinName$' ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["seedBaseline rounding + subtraction + non-negative", "validateJoinName trims/rejects empty"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Join handler (POST /groups/{groupId}/members)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add memberStore interface, shared helpers (internalError, encodeMember), joinMemberHandler; register route.

**Files:** backend/membership.go, backend/main.go

**Verify:** cd backend && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/membership.go", "backend/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["memberStore interface", "join handler 201 + seed", "route registered"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Transition handlers (deactivate/reactivate/promote)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add three idempotent transition handlers (load→404, no-op if already in target state, seed iff entering rotation) + routes.

**Files:** backend/membership.go, backend/main.go

**Verify:** cd backend && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/membership.go", "backend/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["loadMember 404", "three idempotent handlers", "seed-on-entry only", "routes registered"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Backend integration test (testcontainers)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove join/leave/return/promote standings, history-not-double-counted, idempotency, and 404/400 paths.

**Files:** backend/membership_integration_test.go

**Verify:** cd backend && go test -tags=integration -run '^TestMembershipChurnIntegration$' ./...

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/membership_integration_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go test -tags=integration -run '^TestMembershipChurnIntegration$' ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["join/leave/return/promote standings", "history not double-counted", "idempotency", "404/400 paths"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Dev seed gains a guest
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add an active guest (Frankie, a0...006) to seed.sql for the promote demo.

**Files:** backend/seed.sql

**Verify:** cd backend && just seed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/seed.sql"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just seed", "acceptanceCriteria": ["guest user+membership seeded", "idempotent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Mobile members client write ops + status
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add status to Member + addMember/deactivateMember/reactivateMember/promoteMember with unit + integration tests, mirroring lib/picks.ts.

**Files:** mobile/lib/members.ts, mobile/lib/members.test.ts, mobile/lib/members.integration.test.ts

**Verify:** cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/members.test.ts lib/members.integration.test.ts && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/members.ts", "mobile/lib/members.test.ts", "mobile/lib/members.integration.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/members.test.ts lib/members.integration.test.ts && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["status field + parse", "four write ops correct path/body", "tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Migrate navigation to expo-router
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace single-App.tsx entry with expo-router; move turn screen to app/index.tsx; Stack layout; placeholder app/manage.tsx + link.

**Files:** mobile/package.json, mobile/app.json, mobile/tsconfig.json, mobile/babel.config.js, mobile/app/_layout.tsx, mobile/app/index.tsx, mobile/app/manage.tsx (delete App.tsx, index.ts)

**Verify:** cd mobile && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/package.json", "mobile/app.json", "mobile/tsconfig.json", "mobile/babel.config.js", "mobile/app/_layout.tsx", "mobile/app/index.tsx", "mobile/app/manage.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["expo-router entry + deps", "Stack layout", "turn screen moved, behavior intact"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Manage-members screen (app/manage.tsx)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Real manage screen: list members with badges, add-member input (join), per-row deactivate/reactivate/promote, each refetching.

**Files:** mobile/app/manage.tsx

**Verify:** cd mobile && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/app/manage.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["list + badges", "add member", "state-aware row actions", "in-flight guard + error line"]}
```
